title: Import block formatting issues
evidence: data_loader.py:3, server.py:3, test_server.py:3 — import blocks not properly sorted or separated
suggestion: Run ruff with --fix to auto-format imports according to isort rules

title: Unused imports in server.py
evidence: server.py:3-4,9: json, typing.Any, normalize_team_name, team_matches imported but never used
suggestion: Remove: json, Any from typing, and normalize_team_name, team_matches from data_loader imports

title: Line length violations (E501)
evidence: Multiple lines exceed 88 character limit in server.py and test_server.py
suggestion: Refactor long lines to respect the 88-character limit or increase configured max-line-length

title: Ambiguous variable names
evidence: test_server.py:275,421 — variable 'l' (lowercase L) used, ambiguous with numeral 1
suggestion: Rename variable 'l' to a more descriptive name (e.g., 'list_items', 'lines')

title: R7: Performance requirements not verified
evidence: R7 requires simple lookups < 2s and aggregate queries < 5s but no performance tests measure response times
suggestion: Add pytest benchmarks or timing assertions to verify query performance under requirement thresholds
